originalTitle: Reinforcement Learning Dev: Building a High-Perf Continuous Control Engine in PufferLib
title: Adding Multi-Policy Support and Building a Continuous Control Grid Environment in PufferLib
summary: Worked on adding multi-policy support to PufferLib's config loader, then built a continuous grid-based multi-agent environment with discrete and continuous action spaces. Implemented foraging, predator-prey, and grouping tasks, and trained initial policies at high speed.
